zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Lenthall於大約1415年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親Sir Rowland Lenthale17歲，母親Lucy Grey14歲。她於1444年與William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Lenthall于大约1415年出生在英国賀福爾时，她的父亲Sir Rowland Lenthale17岁，母亲Lucy Grey14岁。她于1444年与William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Lenthall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2 English: nickname, perhaps from Middle English, Old French lentil ‘lentil’, perhaps given to someone who grew or sold lentil seeds, used in cooking.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Lenthall was born about 1415, in Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Rowland Lenthale, was 17 and her mother, Lucy Grey, was 14. She married William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth in 1444, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Lenthall est née environ 1415, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Rowland Lenthale, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lucy Grey, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth en 1444, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Lenthall um 1415 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Rowland Lenthale 17 und ihre Mutter Lucy Grey 14. Sie hat 1444 in England William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Lenthall è nata il circa 1415 nel Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Rowland Lenthale, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Lucy Grey, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth nel 1444, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Lenthallが約1415年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Rowland Lenthaleは17歳，母Lucy Greyは14歳であった。1444年にイギリスでWilliam La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Lenthall(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Rowland Lenthale(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy Grey(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1444년 영국에서 William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England,: Harringworth, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Lenthall nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Rowland Lenthale, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Grey, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth em 1444, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Lenthall родилась около 1415 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Rowland Lenthale было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Grey, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth в 1444 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Lenthall nació aproximadamente 1415, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Rowland Lenthale, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Lucy Grey, tenía 14 años. Se casó con William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth en 1444, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
